decisionReason: FOR-343 defines an explicit F16 color-policy boundary and broader evidence gates before any global F16 renderer behavior change. It carries FOR-342's safer-route decision forward, rejects fixture/coordinate branches and unbounded hook mutation, and leaves all renderer behavior unchanged.

boundary.scope: CPU raster F16 color policy evidence boundary before a future global migration

policyAxes.name: sourceColorSpace
policyAxes.futureAttachmentPoint: typed PipelineIR color-space policy block before F16 premul conversion
policyAxes.migrationGate: requires reference/current/candidate samples across arc and non-arc F16 blend scenes

policyAxes.name: alphaQuantization
policyAxes.futureAttachmentPoint: coverage-to-color boundary with an explicit alpha quantization policy
policyAxes.migrationGate: requires worsened-sample accounting and edge/center sample tables

policyAxes.name: compositingBasis
policyAxes.candidateValueFromFOR342: SrcOver composited over white for comparable evidence
policyAxes.futureAttachmentPoint: BlendPlan or pipeline blend/store policy selected by typed color domain
policyAxes.migrationGate: requires non-arc Rec.2020 F16 SrcOver blend proof before global hook change

policyAxes.name: exportReadbackBoundary
policyAxes.candidateValueFromFOR342: encoded sRGB export remains explicit and unchanged
policyAxes.futureAttachmentPoint: readback/export policy boundary after internal SkBitmap.getPixel oracle
policyAxes.migrationGate: requires separate export migration if getPixelAsSrgb semantics change

policyAxes.name: referenceBasis
policyAxes.candidateValueFromFOR342: isolated Skia over-white reference, not raw transparent PNG
policyAxes.currentHookOrEvidence: FOR-340/FOR-342 isolated reference and residual tables
policyAxes.futureAttachmentPoint: evidence artifact schema with reference/current/candidate triples
policyAxes.migrationGate: requires cross-scene reference/current/candidate evidence and raw PNG rejection

futureAttachmentPoints.purpose: make source color space, alpha domain, precision, and reference basis auditable before CPU/GPU specialization

futureAttachmentPoints.owner: future CPU raster F16 conversion boundary
futureAttachmentPoints.purpose: route F16 source-color policy through a named boundary before touching conversion semantics
select compositing basis without fixture or coordinate branches

futureAttachmentPoints.owner: future export/readback migration if approved separately
futureAttachmentPoints.purpose: separate internal oracle behavior from encoded export semantics

broaderEvidenceRequiredBeforeGlobalF16Ch.blocksGlobalChangeUntil: combined with broader non-arc and cross-scene evidence

broaderEvidenceRequiredBeforeGlobalF16Ch.minimumRequirement: A non-arc Rec.2020 kRGBA_F16Norm SrcOver/blend scene with isolated reference, current renderer samples, candidate policy samples, residuals, and worsened-sample counts.
mustNotUseAsSubstitute: FOR-337 M60 targetColorSpaceBlend diagnostic without candidate values

broaderEvidenceRequiredBeforeGlobalF16Ch.minimumRequirement: At least one arc-adjacent group and one non-arc F16 blend group must report reference/current/candidate triples under the same named policy axes before colorToF16Premul, blendF16PremulMode, or export behavior can move globally.
mustInclude: isolated reference or explicit expected reference basis
per-sample residuals and aggregate residual totals

dangerousRouteDiagnostics.reason: would encode policy by scene identity instead of a typed color-policy boundary
would patch selected pixels/cells rather than define global policy semantics
FOR-329 through FOR-342 require exact-cell traceability and reject extrapolation
crop evidence is not an isolated reference for implementation

dangerousRouteDiagnostics.route: mutating colorToF16Premul, blendF16PremulMode, or SkBitmap.getPixelAsSrgb before boundary approval
dangerousRouteDiagnostics.reason: these hooks are global and require broader evidence plus an explicit migration ticket

historicalTraceability.role: historical selected-cell CPU raster audit remains traceable
historical selected-cell sample selection remains traceable
historical CPU color pipeline trace remains traceable
historical Kotlin CPU runtime trace remains traceable
historical F16 diagnostic context remains traceable
selected-cell F16 blend policy prerequisite remains traceable
renderer color-policy cross-scene gate remains traceable
mixed cross-scene evidence finding remains traceable
adjacent F16 runtime trace remains traceable
adjacent isolated Skia reference remains traceable
adjacent candidate policy decision remains traceable
scoped implementation refusal and safer-route decision imported
